note: Sprint 5.9: adds Useful Compute governance gate v0.1. Converts accepted replay validations into review-only reward batches. No automatic payout, no wallet access, no broadcast, no consensus. scripts/trinity/useful_compute_governance_gate.py loads validations + pending rewards, validates structurally, requires validation_status=accepted, manual_review_required=false, unique_workers>=min_workers, full safety_status; rejects mismatch/insufficient/manual_review/missing_reward/duplicate_reward/extra_reward/invalid_structure with closed taxonomy; under conservative policy approved_pending_reward_stocks = min(pending rewards across matching workers). Emits trinity-useful-compute-governance-batch/v0.1 (deterministic, additionalProperties=false, safety_status all const-true) plus Markdown summary. Records rejection lessons into trinity_error_memory. website/trinity-useful-compute.html gains Step 6 Governance Review Batch with local preview, no network primitives, no sensitive inputs, CLI command surface. docs/TRINITY_USEFUL_COMPUTE_GOVERNANCE_GATE_V01.md. Tests: 38 new across tests/trinity/test_{useful_compute_governance_gate,useful_compute_governance_schema,useful_compute_governance_web_safety}.py; static safety + no-network checks extended to cover the gate. Trinity suite 313/313 PASS with materials-engine-private present. No consensus, RPC, node, miner, wallet or wire-format change.
